name: Balsamic Glazed Sweet & Sour Onions (Mm)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: MOLTO MARIO - SHOW #MB5684
Peel the onions, leaving and washing any root strands you may find.
In a 12 to 14-inch sauté pan over medium-high heat, heat virgin olive oil until just smoking. Add butter and cook until foam subsides.
Add onions and saute until light golden brown on all sides, about 8 to 10 minutes. Add sugar, vinegar, tomato sauce, and water and bring to a boil.
Cook onions uncovered, until just al dente, about 10 minutes. If liquid dissipates too quickly, add more water, a quarter cup at a time, realizing that it is essential not to overcook the onions. The sauce should just adhere to the onions. Remove from sauté pan to an earthenware dish and hold in a warm place or allow to cool if serving later or as an antipasto.
